This degree combines the college-required courses with International Business BMGT430 Data Modeling in Business (Select one course from BMGT430 Data Modeling in Business or BMGT438 Special Topics in Operations Management) courses and provides students the opportunity to apply a specified upper level foreign language course toward this specialization’s requirements. It is strongly recommended that this program be declared in combination with another major in or outside of business in order to assure that graduates will have specialized career focus.
